scripts.test:preprod: pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter backend exec prisma validate
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:reset: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/backend && npx prisma db seed
